info.title: PgQueryNarrative API
info.description: Data Storyteller AI - Convert PostgreSQL SQL queries to business narratives

get.description: List configured data connections (id and display name only)

post.description: Execute a SQL query and return results
Generate a narrative report from a SQL query
Rewrite an existing report narrative using a user instruction.
Create or refresh a shareable read-only token link for a report.

get.description: Fetch a report by valid share token.
Find reports semantically similar to input text
Return the list of allowed schemas with their tables and columns (from information_schema, read-only).

post.description: Natural language to SQL and report in one step: ask a question, get a generated SELECT, run it, and return the narrative report. Requires LLM.
Multi-turn Ask conversation with short context memory and optional follow-up suggestions.
Explain a SQL query in plain English (one or two sentences). Requires LLM.

get.description: Return suggested SQL queries: curated examples plus saved queries matching optional intent.

parameters.name: intent
parameters.description: Optional natural-language intent (e.g. 'sales by region'); used to match saved queries.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Max number of suggestions to return

get.description: Suggest natural-language questions based on the current schema for discovery and onboarding.

parameters.name: connection_id
parameters.description: Optional connection ID; defaults to server default connection

get.description: Return saved queries semantically similar to the given text (embedding-based). Requires embeddings to be enabled.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: Natural-language or SQL text to find similar queries for.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Max number of similar queries to return

explanation.description: One-sentence explanation for why this period may be anomalous
